film.title: Amar Prem
film.overview: A village woman abandoned by her husband is forced into prostitution in Kolkata and forms nameless yet strong relations with a wealthy patron as well as an abused boy in the neighbourhood.

dialogues.dialogue: Sister Mandira, will you lend me some food grains? Lend? Why don't you say you've come to beg? Take it that way. It's not for me. I can stay hungry, but mother...Go away! Leaving your husband, aren't you ashamed to go begging? It is a sin to even look at you. Get lost! You had been to my place, hadn't you? Sister-in-law humiliated you?

I helped you and you... - Meaning? It is deserted across the lake at dusk. Aren't you ashamed? You are like my elder brother. By helping me, you want to play with my honor? Shame on you! You saw it with your own eyes? - Yes! Uncle held her hand...and gave her 100 rupees. - Really?
dialogues.cause_raw: taking advantage of a vulnerable situation

dialogues.dialogue: It is deserted across the lake at dusk. Aren't you ashamed? You are like my elder brother. By helping me, you want to play with my honor? Shame on you! You saw it with your own eyes? - Yes! Uncle held her hand...and gave her 100 rupees. - Really? Come with me.

Shut up! Be quiet, sister-in-law. We are not cheap. Your brother-in-law is! - Shut up! You wanton, shameless, characterless w***e! Tell me, how much money did you take from her brother-in-law? And why? Mother! - Don't dare call me mother.

You are going to commit suicide? Too bad. Get up! Was I dead? With me around if you are still in trouble, it's a shame on me! Come, let's go to Calcutta. I told you girls to watch a lot of films these days.
What? - Give me the dagger please. Give it to me. Shame! What a small knife! Where have you forgotten your trident Lord Shiva? What rubbish is that, sir. - Didn't you understand?
No. - Take it. Take it mister. When you didn't feel ashamed earlier, why must you today? Till you live, continue to rob people like this. Go, Nepal babu. Go on!

And I thought you are hiding from me. From you? We are two sides of the same coin, Mr Anand. And besides, where coming here is concerned...I'm more shameless than you are. I must leave now. - What is the hurry? Mr Anand, Pyari and Dulari... - Are they waiting for you?

Mother, he is going there again! - Nandu, you are going there again? I wonder what spell that prostitute has cast on you! That witch is not ashamed of spoiling respectable children. Damn it! I am fed up! That little boy has made life miserable.
But... nothing happened. Nothing. Mister, aren't you ashamed to stay here with your wife? I'm so ashamed that I have to come and go on the sly. You can do that. But what do I do?
dialogues.cause_raw: staying with wife without consummating marriage

dialogues.dialogue: Nothing. Mister, aren't you ashamed to stay here with your wife? I'm so ashamed that I have to come and go on the sly. You can do that. But what do I do? Because of these women, I can't even step out of the house.
dialogues.cause_raw: living with wife in a shared space

dialogues.dialogue: Go on. Mother, brother is back. You are back? Rascal! Devil! Shameless wretch! You went there? You bit me and went to give her the medicine? She means everything! I'm nothing to you!
dialogues.cause_raw: favoring another woman over his family
